name: Advance Pay Day Plus Inc.
description_short: San Diego-based lender offering auto title loans, payday advances, and money transfer services with same-day funding for customers needing immediate cash.
description_long:
Advance Pay Day Plus Inc. operates as a licensed financial services provider in San Diego County, California, operating under the California Financing Law. The company has built a local presence serving customers across San Diego County communities including National City, Coronado, Lakeside, and Poway. According to customer testimonials, the business has maintained operations for several years with repeat clientele.

The company's primary service offerings include auto title loans (minimum $2,600, requiring vehicles valued at $4,500+), payday advances, check cashing, bill payment services, money orders, and international money transfers through RIA and ViAmericas partners serving 48 U.S. states and 17 Latin American countries. Auto title loans are structured as short-term secured loans (typically under 30 days) where borrowers retain vehicle possession while making payments. The company advertises no prepayment penalties and emphasizes straightforward underwriting requirements: proof of vehicle insurance, employment or income documentation, vehicle title, spare key, and utility bill for address verification.

The company distinguishes itself through customer service emphasis, including payment reminder text messages and what customers describe as a non-judgmental lending approach. Testimonials highlight quick approval times ("in and out in minutes") and flexible underwriting compared to competitor institutions. The owner is personally mentioned as responsive and attentive. The company positions itself around transparency, claiming "no hidden fees" and upfront pricing for wire transfer services.

However, important caveats apply. Auto title loans are high-cost short-term products that create collateral risk; borrowers who cannot repay face vehicle loss. The website lacks disclosure of interest rates, fees, or APR information—critical transparency gaps for a lender. Contact information includes a Gmail address (bankstatement724@gmail.com) rather than a business email, raising professionalism questions. Testimonials on the website are heavily duplicated, suggesting potential manipulation. The company operates in a highly regulated space (California Financing Law) but provides no verifiable licensing or regulatory information on the website.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Same-day or next-day funding available for approved auto title loans
No prepayment penalties—borrowers can repay loans early without extra charges
Payment reminder text messages help customers stay current on obligations
Serves unbanked and underbanked populations with flexible income verification (employment, self-employment, disability, unemployment benefits accepted)
Multi-service convenience combining lending, check cashing, bill pay, and international money transfers
Established local business with 5+ year customer retention (per testimonials)
Wide international money transfer network (55,000+ locations across 48 U.S. states and 17 Latin American countries)
cons: No APR, interest rate, or fee disclosures on website—customers cannot comparison shop or understand true cost before applying
Auto title loans carry high vehicle repossession risk; borrowers who default lose transportation and collateral
Contact email is a personal Gmail address (bankstatement724@gmail.com) rather than business domain, reducing legitimacy perception
Customer testimonials are heavily duplicated verbatim on website, suggesting potential fabrication or manipulation rather than authentic feedback
Minimum auto title loan amount ($2,600) and collateral requirement ($4,500+ vehicle value) excludes customers needing smaller emergency amounts
best_for: Vehicle owners with sudden cash needs and clear auto titles who can repay within 30 days
Unbanked or underbanked residents of San Diego County with non-traditional income (self-employed, gig workers, benefit recipients)
Immigrants or international workers needing to send money to Latin America through established remittance networks
Customers prioritizing speed and in-person service over rate optimization
diagnosis: Advance Pay Day Plus Inc. is best for vehicle owners in San Diego County facing immediate cash needs who can pledge clear auto title as collateral and repay within 30 days. Critical caveat: the complete absence of APR, interest rate, and fee disclosures makes it impossible to assess cost competitiveness before applying; customers should contact competitors and request rate quotes before committing, and should understand auto title loans carry vehicle repossession risk if payments are missed.
services: Auto title loans (pink slip loans) with $2,600 minimum, 30-day terms, vehicle as collateral
Payday advances/payday loans with same-day funding
Domestic and international money transfers via RIA
International money transfers via ViAmericas (48 U.S. states, 17 Latin American countries)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 724 Highland Ave B, National City, CA 91950
